title: Bitcoin ETFs Draw $197M, Ending Eight-Week Outflow Streak
dek: Bitcoin ETFs drew $197 million in net inflows, ending eight consecutive weeks of outflows. Analysts are not yet ready to call it a recovery in institutional demand.
author: Crypto Cronkite
key_fact: Bitcoin ETFs recorded $197 million in net inflows, the first weekly inflow after eight weeks of outflows.
bottom_line: A first weekly net inflow after eight straight weeks of outflows is a concrete data point on institutional flows, though the analysts quoted stop short of calling it a turn. What to watch is whether the inflow persists in the weeks ahead.
body: Bitcoin ETFs drew $197 million in net inflows, snapping an eight-week outflow streak, according to reporting from Cointelegraph.
Analysts cited in the same reporting are not yet ready to call the shift a recovery in institutional demand for bitcoin.
